languages.text: Найдены следы волочения тела, будто кто-то намеренно хотел сбросить его с обрыва.

traits.locale_text: Найдены следы волочения тела, будто кто-то намеренно хотел сбросить его с обрыва.

languages.text: Tracks of a body being dragged have been discovered, indicating someone deliberately tried to throw it over the precipice.
languages.original_text: Найдены следы волочения тела, будто кто-то намеренно хотел сбросить его с обрыва.

traits.locale_text: Traces of a body being dragged have been discovered, as if someone deliberately sought to cast it over the precipice.
Traces of a body being dragged have been discovered, as if someone deliberately sought to cast it over the precipice.
Tracks of a body being dragged have been discovered, indicating someone deliberately tried to throw it over the precipice.
Tracks of a body being dragged have been discovered, indicating someone deliberately tried to throw it over the precipice.

languages.text: Es wurden Schleifspuren entdeckt, die darauf hinweisen, dass jemand eine Leiche in den Abgrund geworfen hat.
languages.original_text: Tracks of a body being dragged have been discovered, indicating someone deliberately tried to throw it over the precipice.

traits.locale_text: Es wurden Schleifspuren entdeckt, die darauf hinweisen, dass jemand eine Leiche in den Abgrund geworfen hat.

languages.text: Des traces d'un cadavre qu'on a traîné ont été découvertes, ce qui signifie qu'on a délibérément voulu le jeter dans le précipice.
languages.original_text: Tracks of a body being dragged have been discovered, indicating someone deliberately tried to throw it over the precipice.

traits.locale_text: Des traces d'un cadavre qu'on a traîné ont été découvertes, ce qui signifie qu'on a délibérément voulu le jeter dans le précipice.

languages.text: 发现了拖拽尸体留下的痕迹，说明有人蓄意把尸体扔下悬崖。
languages.original_text: Tracks of a body being dragged have been discovered, indicating someone deliberately tried to throw it over the precipice.

traits.locale_text: 发现了拖拽尸体留下的痕迹，说明有人蓄意把尸体扔下悬崖。

languages.text: Se han descubierto las huellas de un cuerpo que alguien arrastró hasta el precipicio con la intención de arrojarlo por él.
languages.original_text: Tracks of a body being dragged have been discovered, indicating someone deliberately tried to throw it over the precipice.

traits.locale_text: Se han descubierto las huellas de un cuerpo que alguien arrastró hasta el precipicio con la intención de arrojarlo por él.

languages.text: 遺体には引きずった跡があり、まるで誰かが故意に崖から投げ落とそうとしたようだった。痕跡はひとつしかないから、メロビア人が死体を処分する方法ではない。
languages.original_text: There were drag marks on the body, as if someone had deliberately tried to throw it off a cliff. There's only one trail, so that's not how the Merovians get rid of bodies.

languages.text: Bir cesedin sürüklendiğine dair izler bulundu, bu da birinin onu kasıtlı olarak uçurumdan atmaya çalıştığını gösteriyor.
languages.original_text: Tracks of a body being dragged have been discovered, indicating someone deliberately tried to throw it over the precipice.

traits.locale_text: Bir cesedin sürüklendiğine dair izler bulundu, bu da birinin onu kasıtlı olarak uçurumdan atmaya çalıştığını gösteriyor.
